front: What is the role of PEGylation in extending peptide drug half-life?
back: PEGylation attaches PEG (2-40 kDa) to peptides. Increases hydrodynamic radius, reducing renal clearance. Shields from proteolysis and immune recognition. Branched PEG > linear PEG for shielding. Site-specific PEGylation improves homogeneity.
